---
title: New York
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557470/ny_20230128_yhtjw2.png
description: New York sous la neige
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2023/01/28
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557470/ny_20230128_yhtjw2.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
